subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abha Beauty! The poem was perused. It was eloquent and articulate [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی منظومه ملاحظه گردید فصیح و بلیغ بود ولی مطابق آاین
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @Baha'u'llah, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
